summary: PeekPanel feature testing completed successfully. All 11 backend API tests passed. All frontend Playwright tests passed. The lightweight 'peek' panel slides in from the right when clicking intervention cards, displays all explainability fields, and closes correctly via X button, Escape key, or backdrop click.
context_for_next_testing_agent: PeekPanel feature fully working. All data-testids implemented correctly. Priority alert cards use testid pattern 'priority-alert-{athlete_id}-{category}'. Athlete cards use 'athlete-card-{athlete_id}'. Panel uses 'peek-panel', close button 'peek-close-btn', backdrop 'peek-backdrop'. Quick actions: 'peek-action-log-note', 'peek-action-message', 'peek-action-assign'. Main CTA: 'peek-open-pod-btn'. Content testids: 'peek-athlete-name', 'peek-why', 'peek-what-changed', 'peek-recommended-action'.
mocked_api_note: ALL DATA IS MOCKED - backend uses in-memory mock data from mock_data.py

explainability_fields: Priority alerts have all required fields (athlete_name, grad_year, position, team, school_targets, category, why_this_surfaced, what_changed, recommended_action, owner, details, score, urgency, impact, badge_color)
Athletes needing attention have all required fields
Valid category values (momentum_drop, blocker, deadline_proximity, engagement_drop, ownership_gap, readiness_issue)
Valid badge_color values (red, amber, blue, gray)
Owner field populated for all interventions
Context fields present when applicable (event_name, affected_schools, deadline_dates)
api_integrity: Athletes needing attention count within bounds (<= 12)

peek_panel_features: Clicking Priority Alert card opens PeekPanel slide-over from right
Clicking Athletes Needing Attention card opens PeekPanel
PeekPanel shows athlete_name, grad_year, position, team, school_targets
PeekPanel shows 'Why this surfaced' section with content
PeekPanel shows 'What changed' section with content
PeekPanel shows 'Recommended action' section highlighted with owner
3 quick action buttons present: Log Note, Message, Assign
'Open Support Pod' main CTA button present
PeekPanel closes when X button clicked
PeekPanel closes when Escape key pressed
Category label and icon shown correctly (Deadline, Unassigned tested)
Mission Control page functions correctly after panel closes
